TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to machine ACCOUNTING-02,BWLAP-12,BWWS016-PC and Found machine running with older version of crowd strike.So uninstalled the old version  and downloaded and installed the latest sensor

TimeEntry.Title: Cisco umbrella Updated v(3.0.466) - BWWS016-PC,BWWS017-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: Inspection over the cisco umbrella portal and found machine (BWWS016-PC,BWWS017-PC) had older version of Cisco umbrella agent v(3.0.4665), Download the latest version of agent on local , Transfer the

TimeEntry.Title: One Drive Problem
TimeEntry.Notes: Got a mail from teresa about One Drive Problem inform tech and assign ticket to shiveni koshal

TimeEntry.Title: Permission denied to VPN - trying to work from home
TimeEntry.Notes: According to the email, it was checked and found that the servers were offline. The ticket was forwarded to the team lead to investigate the server login from vCenter.

TimeEntry.Title: Permission denied to VPN - trying to work from home
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into user machine and check if we can access the esxi. Logged into the esxi and turn on all the VMs. After that login to all one by one and start all services on the servers.

TimeEntry.Title: One Drive Problem
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to the user machine, found onedrive sync running with over 600000 files in sync so files were not opening, so resynced it & issue is resolved.

TimeEntry.Title: Verifying devices for BWH in MyRMM with MyRemote
TimeEntry.Notes: Verifying devices for BWH in MyRMM with MyRemote

TimeEntry.Title: BWH servers went offline
TimeEntry.Notes: BWH servers went offline so contacted Kraig to find out if he has any update then connected to ESXI via user machine & found all servers powered off so powered them on & monitored the servers.

TimeEntry.Title: BWH servers went offline
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the ESXi host and set up and configure the autostart and setup for all the virtual machines as well.

TimeEntry.Title: Failed window security patches deployed on bwh machines
TimeEntry.Notes: Verified the patches after Automatically deployment,found High vumnerability patches were failed on below Machines so connected to those machines BWWS024-PC,BW-ACCT01,BWWS-CONF2,BWWS011,BRA001 down

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Can't open files: BW homes
TimeEntry.Notes: Got a mail from jessi regarding the one drive issue so connected on computer with the permission of user,unlink the one drive,signout,signin again with user credentials,Also Checked Internet Connec

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Blocked from General-Share
TimeEntry.Notes: As per email request by Linda for having access issue for General share folder in one drive, login into One drive admin console to check the general share folder. It was shared. SO connected to user m

TimeEntry.Title: BWH Backup Failed due to 10GB Network Not communicating on QNAP
TimeEntry.Notes: Backup failed due to network issue, backup repo is not communicating with QNAP, troubleshoot the issue but no luck, worked with Hamid and Kraig but still no luck, then Kraig decided to go onsite.&nbsp

TimeEntry.Notes:
As per the handover from Rahul syncing is in progress.

got the mail from user that the issue is still not fixed, so connect to the user system. he said still the files are not synced with one

TimeEntry.Notes: As per the request download and installed the Technijian tools on the computer.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Can't open files: BW homes
TimeEntry.Notes: As per request from Surinder connected to user machine & called user to understand the issue, user lost files by updating to new OneDrive version & not saving files in the right location, user

TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to the users machine as discussed & removed the double OneDrive versions, uninstalled them and reinstalled new OneDrive and logged in as user & verified that the missing files were a

TimeEntry.Title: Printer setup (Nancy)
TimeEntry.Notes: Assisted Nancy setting up a printer wifi and cabled, assistted setting up a mouse and also cleaning on printer

TimeEntry.Title: assistance server outage
TimeEntry.Notes: Assited with power outage, 10GB network down looking into and finding why server crashed.

TimeEntry.Notes:
Fixed the issue with Backup for BWH.
Reconfigured the 10g interface on esxi, added 1 missing interface on management network, removed the wrongly connected interface from management network, test

TimeEntry.Title: Cisco Switch Stack work
TimeEntry.Notes:
reconfigured crypto key and upgraded the length from 512 to 2048
reconfigured ssh on cisco switch, added username and password and verified the configuration
